title: Aluminum Dog Tags Engraveable Blank Key Chains Military Identification 12 Pack
description:
These aluminum dog tags are great to use for luggage identification and other travel needs. Quickly identify your keys in any key bowl. Identify pets or medications easily with the 12 pack of Aluminum Dog Tags. Sometimes it is best to buy in bulk dog tags so you have spares available in case you need an extra ID Tag. This pack of dog tags comes with 12 blank key chains, all perfect for engraving. Each pack comes with 6 different colors and the chain is 3.25" in length making it ideal for any key ring. Make sure to grab a few of these to easily identify just about anything

Aluminum Dog Tags Engraveable Blank Key Chains Military Identification 12 Pack

These aluminum dog tags are great to use for luggage identification and other travel needs. Quickly identify your keys in any key bowl.

Key Features

  • BULK DOG TAGS: Overall Size: 2" x 1.25" ; Same style and make as the original military neck chain GI dog tags
  • KEY RING BLING: Ball Chain Length: 3.25" ; Ideal key marker for any set of keys and great for tagging luggage when traveling
  • ALUMINUM BLANK DOG TAG: Made from standard aluminum these blank identification tags will hold up to just about any dent or scratch you can throw at them
  • COLORED NAME TAGS: Comes in 6 assorted colors great for identifying pets, medications, luggage and key sets
  • CUSTOM ENGRAVING: Easily laser engrave any name or phrase permanently or use a marker to customize these dog tags

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 12PADT-875
  • UPC: 786705375918
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: 12 Pack
